---
title: "Institutions"
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
source("scripts/site_helpers.R")
meta <- read_meta()
```

Figures cover corresponding-author works published
**`r meta$oa_period_start`–`r meta$oa_period_end`**. The table below summarises
the whole TU9 alliance across the three views; the [home page](../index.qmd) shows
the same readings per university.

```{r}
#| echo: false
alliance_summary_table(meta)
```

Consolidated totals include only the six universities that have weight-1 Leiden
`component` affiliates; the other three have no consolidated row because the
single-institution and consolidated member sets would be identical.

## Universities

Select a university for its OA share by year, OA-status composition, and snapshot
history.

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
institution_directory(meta$institutions, path_prefix = "")
```
